text:
Index: Makefile.inc1
===================================================================
--- Makefile.inc1	(revision 252052)
+++ Makefile.inc1	(working copy)
@@ -114,7 +114,11 @@
 
 BUILDENV_SHELL?=/bin/sh
 
+.if exists(/usr/bin/svnlite)
+SVN?=		/usr/bin/svnlite
+.else
 SVN?=		/usr/local/bin/svn
+.endif
 SVNFLAGS?=	-r HEAD
 
 MAKEOBJDIRPREFIX?=	/usr/obj


-- 
wbr, tiger
